untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition requires detection of flag formation geometry (consolidation after uptrend, trend duration comparison of 6+ days, move magnitude ratio analysis). These structural pattern properties cannot be expressed using only price-derived indicators and mathematical operators. The signal requires explicit pattern detection (flag shape, trend length ratio, percentage move comparison) which is not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using breakout above Donchian upper band as a proxy for flag breakout, but this fails to capture: (1) the preceding uptrend requirement, (2) the consolidation/flag formation itself, (3) the 6-day trend duration differential, (4) the 2x move magnitude relationship. The measure rule for profit target (project half the pre-flag move) also cannot be mechanically calculated from available indicators. This pattern is fundamentally untranslatable without pattern recognition capability.
